subcodes.first_line: The Book speaketh with truth, and verily it is the Path of God unto all who are in the heavens and on earth, and the Sign of Eternity unto those who dwell therein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب ینطق بالحق و انه لصراط الله لمن فی السموات و الارض و آیه القدم لمن فی
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @consolation and comfort
